meaning: n.[逕溷喧]陜勻譜遒ｱ,阨域ｯ堤｢ｱ
examples: Their work determined that muscarine stimulated neural activity, leading to locomotion in the laboratory lampreys.
BACKGROUND: Muscarine receptor plays a key role in adjusting contraction of detrusor muscle cell, and M3R, isoforms of its receptor, can mediate contraction of detrusor muscle cell directly.
Symptoms associated with Parkinson's can be helped by reducing acetylcholine-mediated neurotransmission in the brain, but little work has focused on brainstem muscarine receptors in this disease.
